videos.headline: Highlight: No. 18 Oklahoma gets massive road win at No. 14 Tennessee
videos.description: Despite Joey Aguilar throwing for 393 yards and three TDs for the Vols, the Sooners record 10 TFLs and 192 yards on the ground to grab a 33-27 win in Neyland Stadium.
